nodes.name: create_source.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for CREATE SOURCE DDL statements, testing plan generation for defining external data source connections.

nodes.name: cse_expr.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for common subexpression elimination (CSE), verifying that repeated expressions are deduplicated in the physical plan.

nodes.name: dbeaver.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with DBeaver-generated catalog introspection queries, testing compatibility with DBeaver's PostgreSQL driver queries.

nodes.name: delete.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for DELETE statements, validating DML plan generation including delete filter pushdown.

nodes.name: delta_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for delta join (streaming incremental join) queries, testing the delta join operator plan generation.

nodes.name: distinct_on.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for DISTINCT ON queries (PostgreSQL extension), verifying deduplication plan generation.

nodes.name: distributed_lookup_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for distributed lookup join plans, testing index-based lookup join generation across distributed nodes.

nodes.name: distribution_derive.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input verifying distribution key derivation and exchange insertion for distributed query execution plans.

nodes.name: dynamic_filter.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for dynamic filter plans (streaming filters that update based on incoming data), testing dynamic filter operator generation.

nodes.name: emit_on_window_close.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for emit-on-window-close semantics, validating plan generation for window functions that emit results only when a time window closes.

nodes.name: except.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for EXCEPT (set difference) queries, testing plan generation for set minus operators.

nodes.name: explain.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for EXPLAIN statements, validating the output format and content of query plan explanations.

nodes.name: explain_dot_format.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for EXPLAIN FORMAT DOT output, validating Graphviz DOT format plan visualization.

nodes.name: explain_json_format.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for EXPLAIN FORMAT JSON output, validating JSON-structured plan output.

nodes.name: explain_xml_format.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for EXPLAIN FORMAT XML output, validating XML-structured plan output.

nodes.name: explain_yaml_format.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for EXPLAIN FORMAT YAML output, validating YAML-structured plan output.

nodes.name: expr.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for scalar expressions, covering arithmetic, comparison, string, and built-in function plan generation.

nodes.name: format.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for FORMAT clause in CREATE SOURCE/SINK statements, testing plan generation for various data format specifications.

nodes.name: functional_dependency.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for functional dependency inference, verifying that the optimizer correctly derives column dependencies for plan optimization.

nodes.name: gap_fill.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for gap-fill functions (time series interpolation), testing plan generation for filling missing time series data points.
